entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for resistance to shoot fly

entities.name: SHOOT FLY
entities.description: A pest, Atherigona soccata, that attacks sorghum seedlings

entities.name: LEAF SURFACE WETNESS
entities.description: The presence of water on the central whorl leaf of sorghum seedlings

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to resist attack by the shoot fly

entities.name: TRICHOMES
entities.description: Hair-like morphological structures on the leaf surface

entities.name: STOMATA
entities.description: Microscopic pores on the leaf surface

entities.name: LEAF CUTICLE
entities.description: The protective waxy layer covering the leaf epidermis

entities.name: SURFACE WAX
entities.description: The quantity of wax present on the leaf surface

entities.name: ATMOSPHERIC CONDENSATION
entities.description: The process of water vapor condensing from the air onto the leaf

entities.name: STOMATAL DENSITY
entities.description: The number of stomata per unit area of the leaf

entities.name: CUTICULAR THICKNESS
entities.description: The thickness of the leaf's cuticular layer

relationships.description: Associated with resistance to shoot fly
Sorghum is the host plant for the shoot fly
Indirectly associated with the production of leaf surface wetness

Not associated with the production of leaf surface wetness
Higher amounts found in susceptible genotypes compared to resistant ones
